title: The Sandboxing Manifesto
byline: Panagiotis Moustafellos, Anastassios Nanos, Charalampos Mainas, Kostis Papazafeiropoulos
excerpt: A sandbox is a falsifiable claim. "Sandbox" has been diluted until it guarantees nothing. Ours is a definition sharp enough to be proven wrong: seven checkable properties, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation, not by configuration.
content_html:
Engineering21 Jul 20265 min read

A sandbox is a falsifiable claim. "Sandbox" has been diluted until it guarantees nothing. Ours is a definition sharp enough to be proven wrong: seven checkable properties, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation, not by configuration.

Panagiotis MoustafellosCo-founder & CTO

Anastassios NanosCo-founder & Chief Scientist

Charalampos MainasMember of Technical Staff

Kostis PapazafeiropoulosMember of Technical Staff

Distilled from our white paper "Sandboxing for Agentic Execution". Companion reading: Design for Breach.

"Sandbox" has been diluted until it guarantees nothing. It gets stamped on Docker containers with seccomp profiles, on browser tabs, on YAML policy files running beside the agent they claim to contain. Meanwhile the workload inside changed. An AI agent installs packages, calls APIs, and touches production, and its behavior is a function of whatever text it read five seconds ago. An agent is untrusted code. Where it runs is a security decision, and the industry answers it with a word that means nothing.

We hold ourselves to a definition sharp enough to be proven wrong:

A sandbox collapses the trust problem from "do I trust this agent?" to "do I trust this specification?" It makes the execution environment a verifiable function of an auditable spec, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation that no configuration can weaken.

Seven properties follow. Each can be checked. Each eliminates something.

1. The boundary is hardware. Isolation is enforced by hardware virtualization, not by the host kernel. If the host kernel is in the trust path, it is not a sandbox. This eliminates shared-kernel "sandboxes": containers, seccomp, namespaces, user-space kernels. In Edera's red-team benchmark, LLM agents broke into Docker in roughly half of 18 escape scenarios; hypervisor-isolated zones blocked all but one, and that one fell to a misconfiguration, not a kernel exploit. A vendor-run number, but it points the same way the CVE record does.

2. Zero ambient authority. The workload starts with nothing. No filesystem, no network, no host services. Every capability is explicitly granted, narrowly scoped, revocable. The container model makes security the art of subtracting from ambient authority, and subtraction always misses something. Addition cannot.

3. The trusted computing base is small enough to audit. A microVM monitor is tens of thousands of lines. A shared kernel is tens of millions. A single-application kernel guest is one process: no shell, no package manager, no services the task didn't ask for. Smaller surface, stronger claim.

4. The image is the specification. Built reproducibly from a declarative spec, hash-verifiable by anyone who rebuilds it. No gap between what was reviewed and what runs. Agents cannot be audited. Specifications can.

5. Resource limits hold under attack. CPU, memory, and I/O are enforced by the hypervisor, not negotiated with the guest. An agent that cannot escape can still try to starve its neighbors, and "usually fair" is not a security property.

6. Nothing survives that wasn't declared. Fresh state at start, no residue at teardown, persistence only when explicitly scoped. One task, one microVM, one credential. A compromise ends where the task ends.

7. Configuration cannot weaken isolation. Most container escapes are not kernel exploits; they are one YAML line that was always there. We don't try to prevent bad configuration. We remove configuration from the security boundary.

When a vendor says "sandbox," ask one question: where does enforcement execute? If the guardrail runs in the same kernel as the agent it polices, it is a suggestion the agent can eventually disable, deceive, or race. Guardrails belong on the boundary, never inside it.

The old objection was cost. VMs were too slow for per-task isolation. That argument is dead: microVMs cold-start in milliseconds and pack a million to a server. A shared kernel is no longer a pragmatic compromise. It is just a weaker boundary.

Our position: isolate first, recover utility through explicit grants. The two strategies fail differently. Relaxing the boundary fails silently; each exception is individually reasonable and the sum is a sieve. Granting capabilities fails loudly; an agent missing a grant stops and asks, and the grant is a logged, reviewable event. We choose the failure mode that leaves evidence.

Where we stand. NOFire agents investigate production incidents holding credentials to customer infrastructure, so this definition is the standard our own execution layer is held to. Shipped today: one microVM per task via urunc, no in-guest agent, no guest-to-host control channel, scoped short-lived identity, egress allowlisting, hash-verified images, per-step checkpoint and rollback. Building: runtime policy bands, TEE-backed attestation. Open for everyone, including us: side channels under extreme threat models, and a malicious host.

A sandbox is not a product feature. It is a set of falsifiable claims about an execution environment. Ours are above. Check them.

The white paper behind this manifesto has the threat model, the isolation comparisons, and the evidence for each claim. Get the white paper, or book a demo and check the claims against your own stack.

Go deeper

Seven claims. Check them on your stack.

The full white paper has the threat model, the isolation scorecard, and the evidence behind each claim. Or book a call with a founder to see the boundary live.

blocks.html_en: A sandbox is a falsifiable claim. "Sandbox" has been diluted until it guarantees nothing. Ours is a definition sharp enough to be proven wrong: seven checkable properties, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation, not by configuration.

sentences.en: A sandbox is a falsifiable claim.
sentences.zh: 沙箱是一种可证伪的主张。

sentences.en: "Sandbox" has been diluted until it guarantees nothing.
sentences.zh: “沙盒”已被稀释，直至无法保证。

sentences.en: Ours is a definition sharp enough to be proven wrong: seven checkable properties, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation, not by configuration.
sentences.zh: 我们的定义足够清晰，足以被证明是错误的：七个可检查的属性，由硬件级 microVM 隔离而不是配置来强制执行。

blocks.html_en: "Sandbox" has been diluted until it guarantees nothing. It gets stamped on Docker containers with seccomp profiles, on browser tabs, on YAML policy files running beside the agent they claim to contain. Meanwhile the workload inside changed. An AI agent installs packages, calls APIs, and touches production, and its behavior is a function of whatever text it read five seconds ago. An agent is untrusted code. Where it runs is a security decision, and the industry answers it with a word that means nothing.

sentences.en: "Sandbox" has been diluted until it guarantees nothing.
sentences.zh: “沙盒”已被稀释，直至无法保证。

sentences.en: It gets stamped on Docker containers with seccomp profiles, on browser tabs, on YAML policy files running beside the agent they claim to contain.
sentences.zh: 它被标记在具有 seccomp 配置文件的 Docker 容器上、浏览器选项卡上、在它们声称包含的代理旁边运行的 YAML 策略文件上。

sentences.en: Meanwhile the workload inside changed.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，里面的工作量也发生了变化。

sentences.en: An AI agent installs packages, calls APIs, and touches production, and its behavior is a function of whatever text it read five seconds ago.
sentences.zh: AI 代理安装软件包、调用 API 并接触生产，其行为取决于五秒前读取的任何文本。

sentences.en: An agent is untrusted code.
sentences.zh: 代理是不受信任的代码。

sentences.en: Where it runs is a security decision, and the industry answers it with a word that means nothing.
sentences.zh: 它运行的地方是一个安全决策，而业界用一个毫无意义的词来回答它。

blocks.html_en: We hold ourselves to a definition sharp enough to be proven wrong:

sentences.en: We hold ourselves to a definition sharp enough to be proven wrong:
sentences.zh: 我们坚持一个足够清晰的定义，足以被证明是错误的：

blocks.html_en: A sandbox collapses the trust problem from "do I trust this agent?" to "do I trust this specification?" It makes the execution environment a verifiable function of an auditable spec, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation that no configuration can weaken.

sentences.en: A sandbox collapses the trust problem from "do I trust this agent?"
sentences.zh: 沙箱解决了“我信任这个代理吗？”的信任问题。

sentences.en: to "do I trust this specification?"
sentences.zh: 到“我相信这个规范吗？”

sentences.en: It makes the execution environment a verifiable function of an auditable spec, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation that no configuration can weaken.
sentences.zh: 它使执行环境成为可审核规范的可验证功能，并通过任何配置都无法削弱的硬件级 microVM 隔离来强制实施。

blocks.html_en: A sandbox collapses the trust problem from "do I trust this agent?" to "do I trust this specification?" It makes the execution environment a verifiable function of an auditable spec, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation that no configuration can weaken.

sentences.en: A sandbox collapses the trust problem from "do I trust this agent?"
sentences.zh: 沙箱解决了“我信任这个代理吗？”的信任问题。

sentences.en: to "do I trust this specification?"
sentences.zh: 到“我相信这个规范吗？”

sentences.en: It makes the execution environment a verifiable function of an auditable spec, enforced by hardware-level microVM isolation that no configuration can weaken.
sentences.zh: 它使执行环境成为可审核规范的可验证功能，并通过任何配置都无法削弱的硬件级 microVM 隔离来强制实施。

blocks.html_en: Seven properties follow. Each can be checked. Each eliminates something.

sentences.en: Seven properties follow.
sentences.zh: 接下来是七个属性。

sentences.en: Each can be checked.
sentences.zh: 每一项都可以检查。

sentences.en: Each eliminates something.
sentences.zh: 每一个都消除了一些东西。

blocks.html_en: 1. The boundary is hardware. Isolation is enforced by hardware virtualization, not by the host kernel. If the host kernel is in the trust path, it is not a sandbox. This eliminates shared-kernel "sandboxes": containers, seccomp, namespaces, user-space kernels. In Edera's red-team benchmark, LLM agents broke into Docker in roughly half of 18 escape scenarios; hypervisor-isolated zones blocked all but one, and that one fell to a misconfiguration, not a kernel exploit. A vendor-run number, but it points the same way the CVE record does.

sentences.en: The boundary is hardware.
sentences.zh: 边界是硬件。

sentences.en: Isolation is enforced by hardware virtualization, not by the host kernel.
sentences.zh: 隔离是由硬件虚拟化而不是主机内核强制执行的。

sentences.en: If the host kernel is in the trust path, it is not a sandbox.
sentences.zh: 如果主机内核位于信任路径中，则它不是沙箱。

sentences.en: This eliminates shared-kernel "sandboxes": containers, seccomp, namespaces, user-space kernels.
sentences.zh: 这消除了共享内核“沙箱”：容器、seccomp、命名空间、用户空间内核。

sentences.en: In Edera's red-team benchmark, LLM agents broke into Docker in roughly half of 18 escape scenarios; hypervisor-isolated zones blocked all but one, and that one fell to a misconfiguration, not a kernel exploit.
sentences.zh: 在 Edera 的红队基准测试中，LLM 代理在 18 个逃逸场景中大约有一半闯入了 Docker；虚拟机管理程序隔离区域阻止了除一个区域之外的所有区域，而该区域是由于配置错误而不是内核漏洞造成的。

sentences.en: A vendor-run number, but it points the same way the CVE record does.
sentences.zh: 供应商运行的编号，但它的指向方式与 CVE 记录的指向方式相同。

blocks.html_en: 2. Zero ambient authority. The workload starts with nothing. No filesystem, no network, no host services. Every capability is explicitly granted, narrowly scoped, revocable. The container model makes security the art of subtracting from ambient authority, and subtraction always misses something. Addition cannot.

sentences.en: Zero ambient authority.
sentences.zh: 零环境权限。

sentences.en: The workload starts with nothing.
sentences.zh: 工作量从零开始。

sentences.en: No filesystem, no network, no host services.
sentences.zh: 没有文件系统，没有网络，没有主机服务。

sentences.en: Every capability is explicitly granted, narrowly scoped, revocable.
sentences.zh: 每项能力都是明确授予的、范围狭窄的、可撤销的。

sentences.en: The container model makes security the art of subtracting from ambient authority, and subtraction always misses something.
sentences.zh: 容器模型使安全性成为从环境权威中减去的艺术，而减去总是会错过一些东西。

sentences.en: Addition cannot.
sentences.zh: 加法不能。

blocks.html_en: 3. The trusted computing base is small enough to audit. A microVM monitor is tens of thousands of lines. A shared kernel is tens of millions. A single-application kernel guest is one process: no shell, no package manager, no services the task didn't ask for. Smaller surface, stronger claim.

sentences.en: The trusted computing base is small enough to audit.
sentences.zh: 可信计算基础小到足以进行审计。

sentences.en: A microVM monitor is tens of thousands of lines.
sentences.zh: 一个 microVM 监视器有数万行。

sentences.en: A shared kernel is tens of millions.
sentences.zh: 一个共享内核是数千万个。

sentences.en: A single-application kernel guest is one process: no shell, no package manager, no services the task didn't ask for.
sentences.zh: 单应用程序内核来宾是一个进程：没有 shell，没有包管理器，没有任务不需要的服务。

sentences.en: Smaller surface, stronger claim.
sentences.zh: 表面积更小，主张更强。

blocks.html_en: 4. The image is the specification. Built reproducibly from a declarative spec, hash-verifiable by anyone who rebuilds it. No gap between what was reviewed and what runs. Agents cannot be audited. Specifications can.

sentences.en: The image is the specification.
sentences.zh: 图片是规格。

sentences.en: Built reproducibly from a declarative spec, hash-verifiable by anyone who rebuilds it.
sentences.zh: 根据声明性规范可重复构建，任何重建它的人都可以进行哈希验证。

sentences.en: No gap between what was reviewed and what runs.
sentences.zh: 审核内容与运行内容之间没有差距。

sentences.en: Agents cannot be audited.
sentences.zh: 代理不能被审计。

sentences.en: Specifications can.
sentences.zh: 规格可以。

blocks.html_en: 5. Resource limits hold under attack. CPU, memory, and I/O are enforced by the hypervisor, not negotiated with the guest. An agent that cannot escape can still try to starve its neighbors, and "usually fair" is not a security property.

sentences.en: Resource limits hold under attack.
sentences.zh: 资源限制不断受到攻击。

sentences.en: CPU, memory, and I/O are enforced by the hypervisor, not negotiated with the guest.
sentences.zh: CPU、内存和 I/O 由虚拟机管理程序强制执行，而不是与来宾协商。

sentences.en: An agent that cannot escape can still try to starve its neighbors, and "usually fair" is not a security property.
sentences.zh: 无法逃脱的特工仍然可以尝试让邻居挨饿，而“通常公平”并不是安全属性。

blocks.html_en: 6. Nothing survives that wasn't declared. Fresh state at start, no residue at teardown, persistence only when explicitly scoped. One task, one microVM, one credential. A compromise ends where the task ends.

sentences.en: Nothing survives that wasn't declared.
sentences.zh: 没有宣布的一切都不会幸存。

sentences.en: Fresh state at start, no residue at teardown, persistence only when explicitly scoped.
sentences.zh: 开始时处于新鲜状态，拆卸时没有残留，仅在明确范围内时才持久。

sentences.en: One task, one microVM, one credential.
sentences.zh: 一项任务、一个 microVM、一份凭证。

sentences.en: A compromise ends where the task ends.
sentences.zh: 任务结束时，妥协也随之结束。

blocks.html_en: 7. Configuration cannot weaken isolation. Most container escapes are not kernel exploits; they are one YAML line that was always there. We don't try to prevent bad configuration. We remove configuration from the security boundary.

sentences.en: Configuration cannot weaken isolation.
sentences.zh: 配置不能削弱隔离性。

sentences.en: Most container escapes are not kernel exploits; they are one YAML line that was always there.
sentences.zh: 大多数容器逃逸都不是内核漏洞；它们是一直存在的 YAML 行。

sentences.en: We don't try to prevent bad configuration.
sentences.zh: 我们不会试图阻止错误的配置。

sentences.en: We remove configuration from the security boundary.
sentences.zh: 我们从安全边界中删除配置。

blocks.html_en: When a vendor says "sandbox," ask one question: where does enforcement execute? If the guardrail runs in the same kernel as the agent it polices, it is a suggestion the agent can eventually disable, deceive, or race. Guardrails belong on the boundary, never inside it.

sentences.en: When a vendor says "sandbox," ask one question: where does enforcement execute?
sentences.zh: 当供应商说“沙箱”时，问一个问题：执法在哪里执行？

sentences.en: If the guardrail runs in the same kernel as the agent it polices, it is a suggestion the agent can eventually disable, deceive, or race.
sentences.zh: 如果护栏与其监管的代理在同一内核中运行，则表明代理最终可以禁用、欺骗或竞争。

sentences.en: Guardrails belong on the boundary, never inside it.
sentences.zh: 护栏属于边界，而不是边界内部。

blocks.html_en: The old objection was cost. VMs were too slow for per-task isolation. That argument is dead: microVMs cold-start in milliseconds and pack a million to a server. A shared kernel is no longer a pragmatic compromise. It is just a weaker boundary.

sentences.en: The old objection was cost.
sentences.zh: 旧的反对意见是成本。

sentences.en: VMs were too slow for per-task isolation.
sentences.zh: 虚拟机对于每个任务的隔离来说太慢了。

sentences.en: That argument is dead: microVMs cold-start in milliseconds and pack a million to a server.
sentences.zh: 这个论点已经过时了：微虚拟机在几毫秒内冷启动，并将一百万个数据打包到一台服务器上。

sentences.en: A shared kernel is no longer a pragmatic compromise.
sentences.zh: 共享内核不再是务实的妥协。

sentences.en: It is just a weaker boundary.
sentences.zh: 它只是一个较弱的边界。

blocks.html_en: Our position: isolate first, recover utility through explicit grants. The two strategies fail differently. Relaxing the boundary fails silently; each exception is individually reasonable and the sum is a sieve. Granting capabilities fails loudly; an agent missing a grant stops and asks, and the grant is a logged, reviewable event. We choose the failure mode that leaves evidence.

sentences.en: Our position: isolate first, recover utility through explicit grants.
sentences.zh: 我们的立场：首先隔离，通过明确的拨款恢复效用。

sentences.en: The two strategies fail differently.
sentences.zh: 这两种策略的失败方式不同。

sentences.en: Relaxing the boundary fails silently; each exception is individually reasonable and the sum is a sieve.
sentences.zh: 放宽边界却悄无声息地失败了；每个例外都是单独合理的，总和就是一个筛子。

sentences.en: Granting capabilities fails loudly; an agent missing a grant stops and asks, and the grant is a logged, reviewable event.
sentences.zh: 授予能力的失败声音很大；错过拨款的代理会停下来询问，并且拨款是一个记录的、可审查的事件。

sentences.en: We choose the failure mode that leaves evidence.
sentences.zh: 我们选择留下证据的失败模式。

blocks.html_en: Where we stand. NOFire agents investigate production incidents holding credentials to customer infrastructure, so this definition is the standard our own execution layer is held to. Shipped today: one microVM per task via urunc, no in-guest agent, no guest-to-host control channel, scoped short-lived identity, egress allowlisting, hash-verified images, per-step checkpoint and rollback. Building: runtime policy bands, TEE-backed attestation. Open for everyone, including us: side channels under extreme threat models, and a malicious host.

sentences.en: Where we stand.
sentences.zh: 我们的立场。

sentences.en: NOFire agents investigate production incidents holding credentials to customer infrastructure, so this definition is the standard our own execution layer is held to.
sentences.zh: NOFire 代理调查持有客户基础设施凭证的生产事件，因此这个定义是我们自己的执行层所遵循的标准。

sentences.en: Shipped today: one microVM per task via urunc, no in-guest agent, no guest-to-host control channel, scoped short-lived identity, egress allowlisting, hash-verified images, per-step checkpoint and rollback.
sentences.zh: 今天发货：每个任务一个 microVM，通过 urunc，没有来宾代理，没有来宾到主机控制通道，范围短期身份，出口允许列表，哈希验证图像，每步检查点和回滚。

sentences.en: Building: runtime policy bands, TEE-backed attestation.
sentences.zh: 构建：运行时策略范围、TEE 支持的证明。

sentences.en: Open for everyone, including us: side channels under extreme threat models, and a malicious host.
sentences.zh: 向所有人开放，包括我们：极端威胁模型下的侧通道和恶意主机。

blocks.html_en: A sandbox is not a product feature. It is a set of falsifiable claims about an execution environment. Ours are above. Check them.

sentences.en: A sandbox is not a product feature.
sentences.zh: 沙箱不是产品功能。

sentences.en: It is a set of falsifiable claims about an execution environment.
sentences.zh: 它是一组关于执行环境的可证伪的声明。

sentences.en: Ours are above.
sentences.zh: 我们的在上面。

sentences.en: Check them.
sentences.zh: 检查一下。

blocks.html_en: The white paper behind this manifesto has the threat model, the isolation comparisons, and the evidence for each claim. Get the white paper, or book a demo and check the claims against your own stack.

sentences.en: The white paper behind this manifesto has the threat model, the isolation comparisons, and the evidence for each claim.
sentences.zh: 该宣言背后的白皮书包含威胁模型、隔离比较以及每项主张的证据。

sentences.en: Get the white paper, or book a demo and check the claims against your own stack.
sentences.zh: 获取白皮书，或预订演示，并根据您自己的堆栈检查声明。

blocks.html_en: Go deeper

sentences.en: Go deeper
sentences.zh: 更深入

blocks.html_en: Seven claims. Check them on your stack.

sentences.en: Seven claims.
sentences.zh: 七项主张。

sentences.en: Check them on your stack.
sentences.zh: 检查你的堆栈上的它们。

blocks.html_en: The full white paper has the threat model, the isolation scorecard, and the evidence behind each claim. Or book a call with a founder to see the boundary live.

sentences.en: The full white paper has the threat model, the isolation scorecard, and the evidence behind each claim.
sentences.zh: 完整的白皮书包含威胁模型、隔离记分卡以及每项主张背后的证据。

sentences.en: Or book a call with a founder to see the boundary live.
sentences.zh: 或者与创始人预约电话，实时了解边界情况。

content_html_zh:
工程21 Jul 20265 分钟阅读

沙箱是一种可证伪的主张。 “沙盒”已被稀释，直至无法保证。 我们的定义足够清晰，足以被证明是错误的：七个可检查的属性，由硬件级 microVM 隔离而不是配置来强制执行。

Panagiotis Moustafellos 联合创始人兼首席技术官

Anastassios Nanos联合创始人兼首席科学家

Charalampos Mainas技术人员成员

Kostis Papazafeiropoulos技术人员成员

摘自我们的白皮书“代理执行的沙箱”。 配套阅读：违规设计。

“沙盒”已被稀释，直至无法保证。 它被标记在具有 seccomp 配置文件的 Docker 容器上、浏览器选项卡上、在它们声称包含的代理旁边运行的 YAML 策略文件上。 与此同时，里面的工作量也发生了变化。 AI 代理安装软件包、调用 API 并接触生产，其行为取决于五秒前读取的任何文本。 代理是不受信任的代码。 它运行的地方是一个安全决策，而业界用一个毫无意义的词来回答它。

我们坚持一个足够清晰的定义，足以被证明是错误的：

沙箱解决了“我信任这个代理吗？”的信任问题。 到“我相信这个规范吗？” 它使执行环境成为可审核规范的可验证功能，并通过任何配置都无法削弱的硬件级 microVM 隔离来强制实施。

接下来是七个属性。 每一项都可以检查。 每一个都消除了一些东西。

1. 边界是硬件。 隔离是由硬件虚拟化而不是主机内核强制执行的。 如果主机内核位于信任路径中，则它不是沙箱。 这消除了共享内核“沙箱”：容器、seccomp、命名空间、用户空间内核。 在 Edera 的红队基准测试中，LLM 代理在 18 个逃逸场景中大约有一半闯入了 Docker；虚拟机管理程序隔离区域阻止了除一个区域之外的所有区域，而该区域是由于配置错误而不是内核漏洞造成的。 供应商运行的编号，但它的指向方式与 CVE 记录的指向方式相同。

2. 零环境权限。 工作量从零开始。 没有文件系统，没有网络，没有主机服务。 每项能力都是明确授予的、范围狭窄的、可撤销的。 容器模型使安全性成为从环境权威中减去的艺术，而减去总是会错过一些东西。 加法不能。

3. 可信计算基础小到足以进行审计。 一个 microVM 监视器有数万行。 一个共享内核是数千万个。 单应用程序内核来宾是一个进程：没有 shell，没有包管理器，没有任务不需要的服务。 表面积更小，主张更强。

4. 图片是规格。 根据声明性规范可重复构建，任何重建它的人都可以进行哈希验证。 审核内容与运行内容之间没有差距。 代理不能被审计。 规格可以。

5. 资源限制不断受到攻击。 CPU、内存和 I/O 由虚拟机管理程序强制执行，而不是与来宾协商。 无法逃脱的特工仍然可以尝试让邻居挨饿，而“通常公平”并不是安全属性。

6. 没有宣布的一切都不会幸存。 开始时处于新鲜状态，拆卸时没有残留，仅在明确范围内时才持久。 一项任务、一个 microVM、一份凭证。 任务结束时，妥协也随之结束。

7. 配置不能削弱隔离性。 大多数容器逃逸都不是内核漏洞；它们是一直存在的 YAML 行。 我们不会试图阻止错误的配置。 我们从安全边界中删除配置。

当供应商说“沙箱”时，问一个问题：执法在哪里执行？ 如果护栏与其监管的代理在同一内核中运行，则表明代理最终可以禁用、欺骗或竞争。 护栏属于边界，而不是边界内部。

旧的反对意见是成本。 虚拟机对于每个任务的隔离来说太慢了。 这个论点已经过时了：微虚拟机在几毫秒内冷启动，并将一百万个数据打包到一台服务器上。 共享内核不再是务实的妥协。 它只是一个较弱的边界。

我们的立场：首先隔离，通过明确的拨款恢复效用。 这两种策略的失败方式不同。 放宽边界却悄无声息地失败了；每个例外都是单独合理的，总和就是一个筛子。 授予能力的失败声音很大；错过拨款的代理会停下来询问，并且拨款是一个记录的、可审查的事件。 我们选择留下证据的失败模式。

我们的立场。 NOFire 代理调查持有客户基础设施凭证的生产事件，因此这个定义是我们自己的执行层所遵循的标准。 今天发货：每个任务一个 microVM，通过 urunc，没有来宾代理，没有来宾到主机控制通道，范围短期身份，出口允许列表，哈希验证图像，每步检查点和回滚。 构建：运行时策略范围、TEE 支持的证明。 向所有人开放，包括我们：极端威胁模型下的侧通道和恶意主机。

沙箱不是产品功能。 它是一组关于执行环境的可证伪的声明。 我们的在上面。 检查一下。

该宣言背后的白皮书包含威胁模型、隔离比较以及每项主张的证据。 获取白皮书，或预订演示，并根据您自己的堆栈检查声明。

更深入

七项主张。 检查你的堆栈上的它们。

完整的白皮书包含威胁模型、隔离记分卡以及每项主张背后的证据。 或者与创始人预约电话，实时了解边界情况。
